title: (Bullish Signal) TRN, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling TRN's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 47 similar cases where TRN's MACD histogram became positive, and 35 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 74%. Current price $24.12 is above $22.57 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 11/04/20 - 12/07/20, the price experienced a +25% Uptrend. During the week of 11/30/20 - 12/07/20, the stock enjoyed a +5% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/y0gpuwpotz361.png?width=1531&format=png&auto=webp&s=c5009b285d3cc234065101f247fe9c9f8fb8d33a

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on December 04, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on TRN as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 69 of 98 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 70%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for TRN just turned positive on December 07, 2020. Looking at past instances where TRN's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. detected that in 35 of 47 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

The 10-day Moving Average for TRN crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 11, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 9 of 15 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 60%.

Following a +5.77% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where TRN advanced for three days, in 216 of 315 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 69%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 103 of 187 cases where TRN Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 55%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8184475-trinity-industries-s-trn-24-01-moving-average-convergence-divergence-macd-histogram-just-turned-positive?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
